summary: [Epic] Security and Auth Foundation
description: All work surfacing Firebase Auth in the UI, fixing global Firestore collections, and ensuring GDPR-compliant account deletion. Lifetime: Phase A only — Phase B replaces Firebase Auth with Rails Devise+JWT.

summary: [Epic] Architecture Hardening
description: Repository interfaces, Hilt DI migration, ProGuard/R8 fixes, removal of Android-15-only API requirements. Prepares the codebase for Phase B Rails migration with minimal pain.

summary: [Epic] First-Run Experience
description: 60-second onboarding flow per BIBLE 5.6 — philosophy beat, first-intention input, optional permissions, drop into Today screen.

summary: [Epic] Internationalization
description: Externalize every user-facing string. EN + JP for Phase A. Locale-aware dates, plurals, currency.

summary: [Epic] Quality and Observability
description: Sentry/Crashlytics integration, custom analytics events, GitHub Actions CI, ktlint/detekt config, performance traces.

summary: [Epic] Visual Polish (Screen Quality Bar)
description: Audit every screen against the Quality Bar; codify design tokens; achieve screenshot-ready polish across Timeline, HyperFocus, Calendar, Analytics, Settings.

summary: [Epic] Compliance and Launch Prep
description: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, age gate, trademark notices, Play Store legal requirements.

summary: [Epic] Marketing Site and Store Assets
description: One-page marketing site, domain, waitlist, Play Store listing copy, screenshots, feature graphic, trailer.

summary: [Epic] Beta Operation
description: Closed beta intake, daily triage, mid-week patches, perf hardening, soft launch.

summary: Record 5-minute walkthrough video on a real device
description: Baseline self-review recording before any polish work begins. Output: video file + 10-line written observations.

summary: Build the Screen Quality Bar audit checklist
description: Translate BIBLE 'Screen Quality Bar' into a single-page checklist used to grade every screen.

summary: Audit every screen against the Quality Bar
description: Output: QA debt list (estimated 30-50 child tickets) covering empty states, loading states, error states, animation timing, accessibility, dark-mode parity.

summary: Create YouTrack project structure; import this CSV
description: One-time setup of TiME project, ticket types, priorities, workflow, then bulk import.

summary: Set up Sentry; integrate SDK; verify forced crash
description: Sentry account creation, Android SDK integration, DSN configuration, test crash submission.

summary: Decide YouTrack VCS integration plugin or webhook approach
description: Spike: compare native VCS Integrations plugin vs webhooks vs hybrid. Output: a decision recorded in YOUTRACK_SETUP.md.

summary: Remove @RequiresApi(VANILLA_ICE_CREAM) annotations across MainActivity, NavGraph, SettingsScreen
description: Legacy annotations lock code paths to Android 15 only despite minSdk 26. Refactor or guard properly. Currently crashes on Android 14 or earlier when reached.

summary: Extract TimeRepository interface; rename concrete class FirestoreTimeRepository
description: Foundation for Phase B Rails migration via Strangler Fig. ViewModels see only the interface.

summary: Extract CategoryRepository interface; rename concrete class FirestoreCategoryRepository
description: Same as above for categories.

summary: Update ViewModels to depend on repository interfaces only
description: Compile-time guarantee that no direct Firestore access exists outside the implementations.

summary: Spike: manual DI vs Hilt for solo-dev velocity
description: Recommendation will be Hilt — but spike confirms cost-benefit and any version compatibility concerns.

summary: Migrate to Hilt DI: deps, Application class, ViewModels, Repositories
description: Six sub-steps each behind their own commit. Tests use HiltAndroidRule.

summary: Write 5 unit tests against a fake TimeRepository
description: Establish the testing pattern other ViewModels will follow.

summary: Codify QuietCraftTheme type ramp
description: Six token names: titleLarge, titleMedium, bodyLarge, bodyMedium, labelSmall, displayHero. Each with defined size, weight, line-height.

summary: Codify QuietCraftTheme spacing scale
description: 4 / 8 / 12 / 16 / 24 / 32 dp tokens. Replace any ad-hoc Modifier.padding(11.dp) cases with grep sweep.

summary: Document color palette: dark and light themes plus accent system
description: Markdown file: docs/design-tokens.md. Includes contrast ratios per WCAG.

summary: Replace ad-hoc spacing or typography across screens with codified tokens
description: Sweep pass; grep for any direct font-size or hard-coded padding; verify via lint rule.

summary: Side-by-side visual comparison vs Sunsama, Sessions, Structured
description: Three screenshots each. Output: 3 axes where TiME is weaker. Create child tickets to fix.

summary: Design and implement empty-timeline state
description: Microcopy per BIBLE 5.3: 'Nothing yet. And that's okay.' Visual: calm, no illustration heavier than the rest of the app.

summary: Pull-to-refresh animation timing review
description: Match the easing curve cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1). Max duration 400ms.

summary: Long-press menu polish: edit / delete / duplicate
description: Haptic feedback, animation timing, microcopy review.

summary: Card animation states: running / paused / completed / break
description: Smooth state transitions; pause stripe pattern; completion checkmark animation.

summary: Microcopy pass across Timeline screen
description: Every label re-read against BIBLE 5.3 Words We Use / Never Use. EN + JP.

summary: Capture 5 marketable screenshots from Timeline
description: Reuse for Play Store assets later. Captured at 1080x2400.

summary: HyperFocus carousel animation interruption-recovery review
description: What happens if user swipes mid-animation? Verify state remains consistent.

summary: Live timer rendering perf on midrange Android
description: Profile on Pixel 6a baseline. Target 60fps. No frame drops during running sessions.

summary: Pause / resume / break logic edge-case audit
description: DataStore restore path after process death. Verify breakTimeTotal and totalPausedDuration consistency.

summary: Session completion animation polish
description: The reward moment — should feel earned, not noisy.

summary: HyperFocus carousel empty state
description: 'No active plan' calm visual + CTA to create or load a template.

summary: Stress test: 2-hour 4-session plan, force kill, verify state
description: Output: pass/fail report, bug list if any.

summary: Holiday overlays correctness across JP, US, EU
description: Verify dates against authoritative sources; design soft watermark style.

summary: Analytics charts visual rhythm: Daily / Weekly / Monthly
description: Consistent axis labels, color usage, empty handling, animation entry.

summary: Category breakdown chart polish
description: Donut or bar — choose one and commit. Show legend on tap.

summary: FocusStreakBadge as trophy users screenshot
description: Make it elegant enough that users want to share. Add subtle animation when crossing thresholds.

summary: Analytics empty state for users with under 7 days of data
description: 'Come back tomorrow' calm framing; show what data is being collected.

summary: Settings audit: regroup, clarify each toggle
description: Section groups: Account, Subscription, Appearance, Notifications, Accessibility, Integrations, Privacy & Data, About.

summary: Category Manager: icon and color picker UX

summary: AddTiME screen form validation and keyboard handling

summary: Time picker UX review on small screens
description: Wheel vs grid; one-handed reachability; landscape behavior.

summary: Spike: power-user keyboard shortcuts (defer)
description: Note ideas. Phase B candidate.

summary: Design 5-screen onboarding per BIBLE 5.6
description: Figma mockup. Auto-advance timings, microcopy variants.

summary: Implement OnboardingScreen.kt with internal navigation
description: Self-contained NavController; skip behaviour; back-navigation aware.

summary: OnboardingViewModel + DataStore key 'hasCompletedOnboarding'
description: Persistence of completion state; respect across uninstall/reinstall via Firebase user data once auth exists.

summary: First-intention free-text input; persisted into Timeline
description: User's first answer becomes their first 'today's intention' in the Today screen.

summary: Compose previews for each onboarding screen (light and dark)
description: Five @Preview annotations.

summary: Compose UI tests for onboarding navigation
description: Verify skip, back, and complete flows.

summary: Privacy Policy and ToS stub pages inside onboarding
description: Real legal copy in TIME-701/702.

summary: Settings screen integration: sign-in / out / delete account section
description: Add to existing Settings layout per redesign in TIME-640.

description: Highest single-ticket criticality in Phase A. Path: db.collection('users').document(uid).collection('entries').

summary: Add firestore.rules to repo with deny-by-default authorization
description: Per BIBLE 6.3. Test rules with Firebase emulator.

summary: 7-day personal daily-usage run; log every bug and annoyance

summary: Verify ProGuard / R8 release build does not break Firebase models
description: Common minification gotcha. Test signed release build end to end.

summary: Pre-release build signed and installed on test device
